message:
feat(service): sync Weighted strategy state on LoadBalancer topology changes

Add on_backend_inserted() and on_backend_removed() hooks to the Strategy
trait (with default no-op impls for RoundRobin, PowerOfTwoChoices).
LoadBalancer::update_from_discover() and push()/remove() now call these
hooks after mutating the backend list.

Weighted strategy: Move weights vector inside the Mutex-protected
WeightedState so it can be updated atomically with current_weights.
on_backend_inserted() inserts weight=1 and current_weight=0 at the
given index. on_backend_removed() removes the corresponding entries,
keeping the weights and SWRR state vectors in sync with the backend
list. pick() now resizes current_weights from the authoritative
weights.len() instead of from the loads slice.

Three new tests: weighted_discovery_insert_syncs_strategy_state,
weighted_push_syncs_strategy_state, and weighted_remove_reindexes_
strategy_weights — all verify selection patterns remain correct after
topology mutations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
